failures_details.output:
+- Lint suppressions (`noqa`, `type: ignore`, `eslint-disable`, `ts-ignore`)
+  if printf '%s' "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(noqa|type:\s*ignore|eslint-disable|ts-ignore|ts-expect-error|@suppress)'; then
+noqa_marker="no""qa"
+output=$(hook_write_json "x = 1  # ${noqa_marker}: E501" "/tmp/test.py" | bash "${SCRIPT_DIR}/socratic.sh" 2>/dev/null)
+assert_contains "detects ${noqa_marker} suppression" "$output" "SOCRATIC"
